short_text: Muzarabani to Mayers, Caught by Chakabva!! Muzarabani strikes in his first over. He gets rid of the dangerous Mayers and
full_text: Muzarabani to Mayers, Caught by Chakabva!! Muzarabani strikes in his first over. He gets rid of the dangerous Mayers and gives Zimbabwe a vital breakthrough. full_text: Obed McCoy to Williams, Caught by Pooran!! West Indies are right back in the contest. They have sent back Zimbabwe's most experienced batter cheaply. full_text: Alzarri Joseph to Chakabva, Bowled!! Dragged on! Joseph has been West Indies' best bowler recently and he strikes with his second ball.
